title: Floor Number 7
overview: Popular actor Sadman Chowdhury shot dead by a pistol while filming a scene on the shooting floor of a film. All the shocking information came out one by one in the investigation on the shooting floor. Who exchanged real pistol from props pistol? What could be the motive of the murder?
